name: Blaine C.
excerpt: Vince was exceptional. Highly highly recommend him for your wedding. Extremely thorough as he touched base with us several times beforehand regarding the timing of the songs. Cannot say enough good things. Awesome DJ and an awesome wedding!!

name: Kyle S.
excerpt: Vince was the DJ at a wedding I was at this past weekend. He did a great job from start to finish with variety that satisfied everyone. He threw in a bunch of smooth transitions that got the crowd going and overall kept the vibe high the whole night. I would recommend him to anyone ranging from frat parties to weddings.

name: Dezarae C.
excerpt: He was a wonderful DJ. I highly recommend him to anyone who's looking for a DJ around the area. He made our wedding night very special, and we didn't have to worry about a thing.
